products.name: Daily Barrier Repair Day Cream
products.description: A rich yet fast-absorbing day cream that strengthens the skin barrier. Helps reduce tightness and fine dry lines.
products.how_to_use: Apply every morning on cleansed face and neck after serum. Follow with sunscreen in the daytime.

products.name: HydraBoost Hyaluronic Serum
products.description: A powerful hydrating serum that plumps and smooths the skin's surface. Ideal as a daily moisture booster under any cream.
products.how_to_use: Apply 2–3 drops to slightly damp face after cleansing and toning, then seal with moisturiser.

products.name: Gentle Hydrating Face Cleanser
products.description: A mild gel-based cleanser that removes impurities without stripping moisture. Ideal for daily use on normal to dry, sensitive skin.
products.how_to_use: Use twice daily on damp face, gently massage in circular motions for 30 seconds, then rinse with lukewarm water.

products.name: Barrier Comfort Face Moisturiser
products.description: A cushiony moisturiser that wraps skin in long-lasting comfort. Ideal for compromised and dryness-prone skin.
products.how_to_use: Apply morning and night after serums, using upward strokes over face and neck.

products.name: Nourishing Night Repair Cream
products.description: A rich night cream that supports overnight barrier repair. Skin wakes up soft, supple and more resilient.
products.how_to_use: Apply in the evening as the last step of your routine, massage over face and neck.

conversation_history.assistant: Love to help you find what you need! We have a wide range of beauty products from various brands.

conversation_history.user: Let's start with skincare, what's your main concern?
conversation_history.assistant:
Dry skin can be so uncomfortable!

We have a range of face products suitable for dry skin. Our top picks include the Daily Barrier Repair Day Cream by SkinShield, HydraBoost Hyaluronic Serum by HydraCore, and Gentle Hydrating Face Cleanser by DermaSoft.
